steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both equations give the same value of $y$, so their right sides must be equal.
$$x+4=x^2+x$$

steps.title: Solve for possible values
steps.content:
Subtract $x$ from both sides, then take the square root.
$$4=x^2$$
$$x=\pm 2$$

steps.title: Pick the listed value
steps.content: The possible values are $2$ and $-2$. Of the listed choices, only $-2$ appears. The answer is A.
